title: cratoxylum sumatranum subsp. blancoi
intro: Cratoxylum sumatranum subsp. blancoi, also known as Blanco's cratoxylum, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Hypericaceae, native to the Philippines. It is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects, making it a valuable plant in traditional medicine. The health benefits of Blanco's cratoxylum include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
